title: AggregatePreflightReport
description:
Output ``data`` block for ``aggregate-preflight`` (WS5 #3b).

Wraps inside the standard SuccessEnvelope's ``data`` field (see
envelope.json). Carries one ``SubResult`` per fanned-out sub-call plus
the overall verdict derived from them. Skipped or not-applicable
sub-calls appear as ``null`` so consumers can still introspect shape
uniformly. The ``reconcile`` slot is ``null`` whenever the reconcile
branch did not fire (no ``reconcile_scheduler``, journal hint not
``monitor``, no in-flight run, or skipped).

overall.title: Overall
overall.description: ``fail`` if any sub-call that actually ran returned ``ok: false``; else ``pass``. A reconcile branch that never fired does not affect the verdict (it is ``null``, not a failure).

SubResult.description: One sub-call's outcome — verbatim envelope + elapsed wall-clock + ``ok`` mirror. Skipped / not-applicable sub-calls show as ``null`` at the parent (not a SubResult with ``ok: false``) so a re-run can target only the missing piece.
SubResult.title: SubResult
